emotion_and_action.pt: você sente raiva, medo ou estresse
emotion_and_action.en: you feel anger, fear, or stress

emotion_and_action.pt: mas sentir algo não significa que você deve agir
emotion_and_action.en: but feeling something does not mean you must act on it

emotion_and_action.pt: muitos problemas surgem quando a emoção controla a ação
emotion_and_action.en: many problems come when emotion controls action

emotion_and_action.pt: sinta a emoção, mas não obedeça a ela
emotion_and_action.en: feel the emotion, but don’t obey it

emotion_and_action.pt: diga: eu sinto isso, mas escolho o que faço
emotion_and_action.en: say: i feel this, but i choose what i do
